name: Lentil Fatta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Pita Bread (or other bread, cubed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lentils, water, onion, olive oil, salt, and pepper in a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer until the lentils are very soft, about 50-60 minutes.
3. Drain the lentils and let them cool.
4. Add cubed pita bread and chopped green onion to the cooled lentils.
5. Mix well.
6. Serve with fresh lemon juice and additional olive oil, if desired.
From The Yemenite Cookbook by Zion Levi and Hani Agabria. New York: Seaver Books, 1988. Pg. 30.
